Title: Southern Quilting Traditions Oral History Collection

Author: Cerny, Catherine
Title: Quilt Studies and the Material Culture Method

Title: Thinking Through Craft
Notes: Theory chapter framing craft versus art

Title: A Communion of the Spirits: African American Quilters

Title: To Honor and Comfort: Native Quilting Traditions
